{
  "name": "flux",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Umbrella app: Workouts, Meditate, Check-in",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc -b && vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "typecheck": "tsc -b --noEmit",
    "test": "playwright test",
    "validate-catalog": "tsx scripts/validate-catalog.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@capacitor/android": "^6.2.0",
    "@capacitor/app": "^6.0.2",
    "@capacitor/core": "^6.2.0",
    "@capacitor/haptics": "^6.0.2",
    "preact": "^10.25.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@capacitor/cli": "^6.2.0",
    "@playwright/test": "1.57.0",
    "@preact/preset-vite": "^2.10.1",

    "postcss": "^8.4.49",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.17",
    "tsx": "^4.22.1",
    "typescript": "^5.7.2",
    "vite": "^5.4.11"
  }
}

input.command:
git add src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx tests/workouts.spec.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
workouts: hide difficulty toggles until exercise is marked done

The FAILED/EASY/GOOD/HARD difficulty grid and the failed-set/rep
sub-controls were rendering unconditionally on every exercise card.
Gate them behind `completed` so they only appear after the user taps
Done (and disappear if Done is toggled off). The notes textarea stays
visible at all times.
EOF
)" && git push -u origin HEAD 2>&1 | tail -20

input.command:
gh pr create --reviewer patflynn --title "workouts: hide difficulty toggles until exercise is marked done" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

The Workouts tab regressed: the four difficulty buttons (FAILED / EASY / GOOD / HARD) and the failed-set/failed-rep range inputs were rendering on every exercise card at all times, instead of only after the user marked an exercise Done.

## Fix

Wrap both the difficulty grid and the failed-state sub-block in `{completed && (...)}` in `src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx`. The notes textarea below remains unconditionally visible. The default-to-good selection logic and the `toggleDone` un-complete behavior are untouched, so:

- Tapping Done reveals the toggles with 'good' pre-selected.
- Picking a difficulty then un-tapping Done still preserves the value in the log (existing `remove` logic in `toggleDone`).
- Re-tapping Done re-shows the toggles with the previously-selected value still highlighted.

## Test

Added `difficulty toggles hidden until Done is tapped` to `tests/workouts.spec.ts` covering the hidden → visible → hidden round-trip via the existing `done-${index}` / `difficulty-${index}-${d}` test IDs.

## Test plan

- [x] `nix develop --command npm run typecheck`
- [x] `nix develop --command bash -c "npm ci && npm run build"`
- [x] `nix develop .#test --command npx playwright test --project=chromium` — 14 passed

Run: 20260518-2052-ed7f37b9
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -10

content.text:
PR opened: https://github.com/gunk-dev/flux/pull/73

**Summary:**
- Gated the difficulty grid + failed-set/rep sub-block behind `{completed && (...)}` in `src/tabs/Workouts/components/ExerciseCard.tsx:221-282`, using Preact Fragment shorthand. Notes textarea unchanged.
- Added e2e test `difficulty toggles hidden until Done is tapped` in `tests/workouts.spec.ts` covering hidden → tap Done → visible → un-tap Done → hidden.
- Typecheck, production build, and full Playwright suite (14/14) pass. `klaus _pre-review` reported no issues.
